visa_types.name: Medical Treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jor/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Click here to download the checklist for the corresponding Visa type
visa_types.visa_fees:
[cze > jor > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- All Fees are non-refundable
- The Embassy of Czech Republic shall revise the visa       fee regularly in order to reflect the administrative costs.
- In individual cases,       the amount of the visa fee to be charged may be waived or reduced when to       do so serves to promote cultural or sporting interests as well as       interests in the field of foreign policy, development policy and other       areas of vital public interest or for humanitarian reasons.
- There is an optional courier passport       pass back facility available for 8 JOD per application, payable in cash       only.
visa_types.processing_time:
- Applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application which is admissible
- That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member State are consulted.
- Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required.
The Embassy of Czech Republic in Amman shall maintain the possibility for all applicants to lodge their applications directly at its consulate.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category, kindly refer to the information sheet of documents required.
The Embassy of Czech Republic in Amman shall maintain the possibility for all applicants to lodge their applications directly at its consulate.

## Visa Fees

[cze > jor > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- All Fees are non-refundable
- The Embassy of Czech Republic shall revise the visa       fee regularly in order to reflect the administrative costs.
- In individual cases,       the amount of the visa fee to be charged may be waived or reduced when to       do so serves to promote cultural or sporting interests as well as       interests in the field of foreign policy, development policy and other       areas of vital public interest or for humanitarian reasons.
- There is an optional courier passport       pass back facility available for 8 JOD per application, payable in cash       only.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jor/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Click here to download the checklist for the corresponding Visa type

## Photo Specifications
Information for visa applicants

## Photograph specifications:

## FORMAT
Full front view of face, centred, features from chin to hairline and both sides of face must be clearly visible. From top to bottom face must fill 70-80% (between 32 and 36 mm) of the photograph. Front of head (including hair) must be completely visible, with dimensions of face as specified.

## CONTRAST AND SHARPNESS
Whole face must be clear, with proper contrast and sharpness.

## LIGHTING
Face must be well lighted, with no flash reflections, shadows or red eyes.

## BACKGROUND
Background must be uniform, light-colored (ideally a neutral grey) and provide a good contrast with face and hair. Best background for light-colored hair is medium-grey, for dark hair light-grey. Photograph must show subject only (no other person or items permitted, important especially for photographs of young children). Shadows on background are unacceptable.

## PHOTOGRAPHIC QUALITY
Photograph should be printed on high-quality paper, resolution at least 600 DPI (dots per inch), have no creases or marks and represent natural skin tones.
HEAD POSITION, FACIAL EXPRESSION AND DIRECTION
A position with the head leaning or turned (e.g. half profile) is unacceptable. Facial expression must be neutral and the mouth closed. Subject must look straight into the camera. Eyes must be open and well visible, not covered by hair or frame of glasses. 

## GLASSES
Eyes must be clearly visible (reflections on glasses, tinted or sun glasses are unacceptable). The edge of the glasses or frame must not cover the eyes.

## HEADCOVERINGS
Head coverings of any kind are unacceptable. Exceptions can be made for religious reasons.
Click  here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2FXb2emP5BPqEbydUGnhAl/e889ba8c8bc28d103a2024d1012df722/fotomustertafel_2005_english_141212.pdf) for more clear details

## Processing Time
- Applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application which is admissible
- That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member State are consulted.
- Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.

## Download Form

Schengen Visa Application Form
Confirmation of Sponsorship (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/rba6aoGM4c0xrCxRVIZ5p/4593be7d50af4ab164a26d6f93fd81ee/confirmation_sponsorship_170416.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Download Form

Schengen Visa Application Form

visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jor/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Click here to download the checklist for the corresponding Visa type
Note:
Passport (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/34Id27jNgTUJXrispgLhei/bf8d56442f40f34f55e0cdebd94c7818/Check-list-of-visa-requirements-Czech-02-No-2023.pdf) should be valid for 6 months after leaving Schengen Area.

- Leave permission.
- Contact details of the employer

[cze > jor > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- All Fees are non-refundable
- The Embassy of Czech Republic shall revise the visa       fee regularly in order to reflect the administrative costs.
- In individual cases,       the amount of the visa fee to be charged may be waived or reduced when to       do so serves to promote cultural or sporting interests as well as       interests in the field of foreign policy, development policy and other       areas of vital public interest or for humanitarian reasons.
- There is an optional courier passport       pass back facility available for 8 JOD per application, payable in cash       only.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/jor/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- Click here to download the checklist for the corresponding Visa type

## Photo Specifications
Information for visa applicants

## Photograph specifications:

## FORMAT
Full front view of face, centred, features from chin to hairline and both sides of face must be clearly visible. From top to bottom face must fill 70-80% (between 32 and 36 mm) of the photograph. Front of head (including hair) must be completely visible, with dimensions of face as specified.

## CONTRAST AND SHARPNESS
Whole face must be clear, with proper contrast and sharpness.

## LIGHTING
Face must be well lighted, with no flash reflections, shadows or red eyes.

## BACKGROUND
Background must be uniform, light-colored (ideally a neutral grey) and provide a good contrast with face and hair. Best background for light-colored hair is medium-grey, for dark hair light-grey. Photograph must show subject only (no other person or items permitted, important especially for photographs of young children). Shadows on background are unacceptable.

## PHOTOGRAPHIC QUALITY
Photograph should be printed on high-quality paper, resolution at least 600 DPI (dots per inch), have no creases or marks and represent natural skin tones.
HEAD POSITION, FACIAL EXPRESSION AND DIRECTION
A position with the head leaning or turned (e.g. half profile) is unacceptable. Facial expression must be neutral and the mouth closed. Subject must look straight into the camera. Eyes must be open and well visible, not covered by hair or frame of glasses. 

## GLASSES
Eyes must be clearly visible (reflections on glasses, tinted or sun glasses are unacceptable). The edge of the glasses or frame must not cover the eyes.

## HEADCOVERINGS
Head coverings of any kind are unacceptable. Exceptions can be made for religious reasons.
Click  here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2FXb2emP5BPqEbydUGnhAl/e889ba8c8bc28d103a2024d1012df722/fotomustertafel_2005_english_141212.pdf) for more clear details

## Processing Time
- Applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application which is admissible
- That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed or in cases of representation where the authorities of the represented Member State are consulted.
- Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 calendar days.

- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
